div.p: RST Out-of-Window Action: Silently Ignore No state change No response sent
Return to LISTEN Action: • Delete connection TCB • Release resources • Allow new SYN to be accepted
Abort Connection Action: • Set error = ECONNRESET • Notify application • Release all resources • Delete TCB
Abort Connection States: FIN_WAIT_1, FIN_WAIT_2, CLOSE_WAIT, CLOSING, LAST_ACK Action: Release resources, CLOSED
Absorb RST Action: • Transition to CLOSED • Cancel TIME_WAIT timer • Release TCB
LISTEN State Handling Action: Silently drop No connection exists No response sent
Connection Failed Action: • Set error = ECONNREFUSED • Notify application • Transition to CLOSED
Sequence Validation (RFC 793) RST is acceptable ONLY if: RCV.NXT ≤ SEG.SEQ < RCV.NXT + RCV.WND Prevents spoofed blind resets.
Server Special Case SYN_RECEIVED → LISTEN Allows server to continue listening. Accepts new SYN immediately.
Protocol Invariant: Never send RST in response to RST! Prevents infinite RST recursion loops.
